settings.heading: Built with clinical rigor and veterinary expertise
settings.body: Nuumipet was founded on one belief: pet parents deserve transparency. Every formula starts with peer-reviewed science, refined by veterinary advisors, and tested for safety and efficacy before it reaches your door.
settings.quote: When pet parents understand what they're giving their dog — and why it works — trust follows naturally. Root-cause solutions are what bring long-term relief.
settings.name: Dr. Sarah Jenkins, DVM

settings.heading: Trusted by thousands of pet parents — here's why
settings.intro: From formulation to your front door, every decision we make is built around your confidence and your pet's wellbeing.

settings.question: How does EnerCanis improve my dog's gut health?
settings.answer: EnerCanis uses pharmaceutical-grade L-Glutamine and Hydrolyzed Collagen to repair the intestinal barrier, sealing and soothing the gut lining. Most pet parents notice a visible improvement in digestion, stool quality, and energy levels within 2–3 weeks of daily use.

settings.question: Is the ByeBark ultrasonic device safe?
settings.answer: Absolutely. ByeBark uses safe, high-frequency sound waves that disrupt unwanted behavior — like frantic barking, jumping, and fence-fighting — without causing any pain or distress. It's a humane, drug-free solution recommended by trainers and vets alike.

settings.question: How long does a CalmiCollar last?
settings.answer: Each CalmiCollar releases soothing maternal pheromones continually for up to 30 days. It's ideal for ongoing separation anxiety, travel stress, or post-rescue adjustment periods. Simply replace at the end of the month for uninterrupted comfort.

settings.question: Why are PawPoint ear wipes better than liquid drops?
settings.answer: Standard liquid drops tend to push wax and debris deeper into the ear canal. PawPoint's precision finger-grip design lets you physically reach hidden folds and crevices that trap debris — preventing the recurring infections that liquid solutions miss.

settings.question: Can I use multiple Nuumipet products together?
settings.answer: Yes — our products are designed to complement one another. For example, pairing EnerCanis (gut health) with CalmiCollar (anxiety relief) addresses both physical and behavioural wellbeing simultaneously. If you have specific health concerns, always consult your vet first.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer a full 30-day money-back guarantee on every order, no questions asked. If you're not completely satisfied, simply contact our support team and we'll arrange a prompt refund or exchange.

settings.heading: Get the answers you need before you buy
settings.intro: Still have questions? Our support team is always available — reach us anytime at hello@nuumipet.com.
